summary: Frontend testing of combined Beneficiaries page - All 8 features verified working. The Units and Beneficiaries pages were successfully merged into a single /beneficiaries page with 3 tabs (Overview, Certificates, Transfers). Demo data shows correct 100 total units across 4 holders. Validation feedback works when issuing more units than available. Old URLs properly redirect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beneficiaries page at /beneficiaries combines former Units and Beneficiaries pages. Has 3 tabs: Overview (pie chart + holder list), Certificates (issue/transfer/revoke), Transfers (history). Demo data: 4 holders with 100 total units - John Smith 40, Jane Smith 30, Smith Family Trust 20, Robert Smith Jr 10. Old routes /trust/units and /trust/beneficiaries redirect to /beneficiaries.

/beneficiaries_page_loads_with_overview_.details: Page loads at /beneficiaries with Overview tab active by default. Shows pie chart, 4 summary cards (Total Authorized: 100, Issued: 100, Remaining: 0, Beneficiaries: 4), and Certificate Holders list.

overview_tab_pie_chart.details: Ownership Distribution pie chart displays correctly showing 4 colored segments for each holder with percentages in legend.

overview_tab_4_beneficiaries_percentages.details: 4 beneficiaries displayed with correct data: John Smith 40 units (40.00%), Jane Smith 30 units (30.00%), Smith Family Trust 20 units (20.00%), Robert Smith Jr 10 units (10.00%)

certificates_tab_4_certificates.details: Certificates tab shows 4 certificates with correct data: CU-001 John Smith 40 Units (40.00%) active, CU-002 Jane Smith 30 Units (30.00%) active, CU-003 Smith Family Trust 20 Units (20.00%) active, CU-004 Robert Smith Jr 10 Units (10.00%) active. Shows 'Available: 0 units of 100'.

issue_units_button_opens_modal.details: Clicking 'Issue Units' button opens modal with holder name, holder identifier, units, issue date, and notes fields. Modal shows '0 units available' message.

validation_error_exceeds_available_units.details: When entering units > 0 available (tried 50), red validation error appears: 'Exceeds available units (0 remaining)' with warning icon. Prevents issuing more than available.

old_urls_redirect.details: /trust/units redirects to /beneficiaries. /trust/beneficiaries redirects to /beneficiaries. Both redirects work correctly.

sidebar_single_beneficiaries_link.details: Sidebar shows single 'Beneficiaries' link with Users icon. No separate 'Units' link exists (correctly merged). Link navigates to /beneficiaries.

transfers_tab_works.details: Transfers tab shows 'TRANSFER HISTORY' section. Currently displays 'No transfers recorded yet' with message 'Transfers will appear here when units are moved between holders'.

decimal_input_no_forced_decimals.details: Settings modal 'Total Authorized Units' input accepts integer values without forcing decimal places. Typing '150' keeps value as '150' not '150.000'.

settings_modal_allow_fractional.details: Settings modal includes 'Allow Fractional Units' toggle with description 'Enable decimals (e.g., 12.5 units)'.
